notes: Restores the last known usable comments-first boot path based on CC7.4.9 direct loader.
Does not boot adminkit-clean-menu-core because CC7.5.0 broke comments opening and hid Archive from menu.
Keeps routes/commentOpenState.js, services/postMetaService.js, public/app-onepass.js and native open_app comment path untouched.
Keeps Archive Lite layer temporarily so Archive can be tested, but comments stability is the acceptance priority.
No external code.run /app comments button, no overlay, no floating hints, no visual redesign.
Test target: new post opens comments and shows post snapshot; /start shows menu; debug top runtime and package runtime both show CC7.5.1.
